search_document:
User Request: Employee sales trends.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Monthly Sales Trends
Type: chart
Description: Trend of sales over the months
Title: Top Performing Employees
Type: table
Description: Employees with the highest sales
Title: Total Sales Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Overall sales revenue generated by employees
Title: Sales by Region
Type: chart
Description: Sales distribution across different regions
Title: Sales Performance by Product
Type: chart
Description: Sales performance metrics for each product

sql_queries.title: Monthly Sales Trends
sql_queries.description: Trend of sales over the months
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Top Performing Employees
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName, e.LastName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Sales Revenue
sql_queries.description: Overall sales revenue generated by employees
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM "Order Details" od

sql_queries.title: Sales by Region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.Region, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY e.Region

sql_queries.title: Sales Performance by Product
sql_queries.description: Sales performance metrics for each product
sql_queries.sql: SELECT p.ProductName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Products p JOIN "Order Details" od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID GROUP BY p.ProductID ORDER BY TotalSales DESC
